title: Aritharam Poosi Song Lyrics Yaadhumaagi Nindraai
stanzas:
Aritharam Poosi
aadunee maharaasi
azhagaana mugaraasi
unnoda kaalamthaan inimela
ulagam kondadum
unnathaan thalamaela.(3)

pala kannupattu
paakku eda.
adhukellaam vandhu
nee sollu vidai.

Aritharam Poosi
aadunee maharaasi
azhagaana mugaraasi
unnoda kaalamthaan inimela
ulagam kondadum
unnathaan thalamaela

natta vidhai
maela varum
nambikkaiya nenjil yaethu
ini putham pudhu
natpu varum
unnoda kaiyya
dhinam koarthu

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Aritharam Poosi?

The song conveys deep romantic feelings and the beauty of love, reflecting the emotions of the characters in the movie.

What is the plot context of Yaadhumaagi Nindraai?

The movie revolves around themes of love and relationships, showcasing the journey of the protagonists through various emotional experiences.

Who is the singer of Aritharam Poosi?

The song is sung by Reeta Anthony, known for her soulful voice and expressive singing style.

Who composed the music for the song?

The music for Aritharam Poosi was composed by Ashwin Vinayagamoorthy, who is recognized for his melodic compositions.

When was Aritharam Poosi released?

The song was released on February 20, 2017.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Aritharam Poosi, the protagonist expresses their deep affection and longing through heartfelt lyrics and a soothing melody. The song beautifully encapsulates the romantic essence of the film Yaadhumaagi Nindraai, making it a perfect backdrop for intimate moments. The emotional depth conveyed through Reeta Anthony's voice resonates with listeners, evoking feelings of love and nostalgia. This melody serves as a reminder of the beauty of relationships and the emotions that come with them.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Aritharam Poosi from Yaadhumaagi Nindraai is a captivating romantic melody that beautifully captures the essence of love. With Reeta Anthony's enchanting vocals and Anthonydasan's heartfelt lyrics, this song creates a soothing atmosphere that resonates with listeners. Experience the magic of Ashwin Vinayagamoorthy's composition that elevates the emotional depth of the film.
stanzaMeanings: You are a beautiful queen, and your time will make the world dance on your head.
When I see you, I feel like I am in a dream.
You speak like a queen, waving your hand.
It cannot be done by a girl, that is the limit.
Look at many eyes, and you will find the answer.
Time will pass, little one, and you will succeed.
You are the beautiful queen, and your time will make the world dance on your head.
The trust that comes from the seeds will grow in the heart, and new friendships will come from your hands every day.
In many ways, I will come looking for you in the show.
On that day, I will express all the good feelings in my heart.
Time will pass, little one, and you will succeed.
